title: cajanus cinereus
intro: Cajanus cinereus, also known as the pigeon pea or red gram, is a tropical legume plant native to Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Cajanus cinereus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming Cajanus cinereus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and providing essential nutrients such as protein, fiber, and iron. In herbal preparations, Cajanus cinereus is often used in teas, soups, and stews, and its seeds can be roasted and used as a coffee substitute.
